chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application No. 608 of 2022 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objection. 2. For Order on CMA No. 2173/25. 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For Order on CMA No. 2124/25. 13.10.2025 None present This reference is pending since 2022 without any progress. Order sheet denotes that on two previous occasions, time has been sought by the applicant’s counsel and matter has been adjourned. Today, applicant remains unrepresented without intimation or justification. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Ayaz P.S.
